description_for_human: The #1 skill directory for Claude Code. 38,000+ skills, 100+ MCP connectors, plugins, and an AI Solutions Architect that builds custom tool stacks for any professional goal.
description_for_model: AI Solutions Architect for Claude Code. 28 tools across 5 categories: discovery (search/filter 38,000+ skills, 100+ MCP connectors, plugins), AI agent (solve_goal builds two curated solution options with trust scores and install commands for any professional goal; get_role_kit returns tiered toolkits by role), generation (generate_custom_skill creates SKILL.md files; suggest_for_skill_creation recommends dependencies), intelligence (trending_solutions, explain_combination, rate_recommendation), and platform (a2a_query for agent-to-agent, agent_analytics, community templates). For complex goals like 'set up outbound email via Gmail', ALWAYS use solve_goal first — it searches across all catalogs and returns two complete options with compatibility analysis, trust scores, and step-by-step install commands.
